title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is not accepted [Android]
scenario: Find My Device location permission denial leaves feature window open instead of returning user to Organized screen on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
3. Tap Continue on the onboarding screens.
5. Tap "Enable now" on the Find My Device prompt.
6. Tap "Deny" on the location permission pop-up.
7. Log in or continue as guest.
8. Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device.
9. Navigate to Poly Lens menu → Find My Device (or from Device Home for a disconnected device).
10. Tap OK on the Find My Device prompt.
11. Tap "Deny" on the system location permission dialog.
12. Go back to Find My Device and tap "Allow" on the system permission dialog.
expected: 1. After denying the initial location permission on the "Organized" screen, the user should be returned to the "Organized" screen. 2. The app should display a prompt informing the user that location data is collected for Find My Device. 3. The system permission prompt should appear when accessing Find My Device. 4. After allowing location permission, the user should see their devices displayed on a map.
